data.definition: Terminal-native reverse engineering workspace for binaries, firmware, traces, crashes, notes, findings, and reportable evidence.
A focused TUI view over the same project object graph, such as Binary Map, Function Radar, Graph Lab, Trace Lab, Diff Lab, Firmware Lab, Crash Lab, Protocol Lab, Notes, and Findings.
Prioritized function triage surface that ranks functions by suspiciousness, relevance, change, execution evidence, and analyst tags.
Navigation model where strings, functions, xrefs, traces, crashes, notes, and findings can jump to related objects through the unified graph.

data.title: Replace IDA or Ghidra
data.rationale: RevDeck should complement deep disassemblers by managing project memory, multi-artifact evidence, and terminal-native navigation rather than reimplementing full decompilation first.

data.title: Build all labs in v0.1
data.rationale: RevDeck.txt explicitly recommends cutting the MVP to Binary Triage before Graph, Diff, Trace, Firmware, Crash, Protocol, Memory, and Plugin API expansion.

data.description: Create and open RevDeck projects, import a binary target, extract sections, symbols, strings, imports, functions, xrefs, and baseline metadata into SQLite.
Provide the core three-pane TUI shell with workspace navigation, main lens, inspector, status line, and command bar.
Rank and explain high-value functions using size, imports, strings, xrefs, dangerous API calls, change signals, trace/crash links, and analyst tags.
Enable cross-object jumps from strings to xrefs, functions, graphs, traces, crashes, notes, and findings through a unified object graph.
Persist analyst notes, tags, renames, review status, TODOs, hypotheses, evidence links, and backlink context on any object.
Convert evidence-linked analysis into structured findings and export Markdown, HTML, JSON, SARIF, SQLite bundle, or project archive outputs.
Introduce local graph navigation for xrefs, call graph, simple CFG, and source-to-sink path sketches without attempting global graph rendering first.
Define importer/analyzer adapter contracts for Ghidra, radare2, Frida trace JSONL, Volatility JSON, pcap/tshark, ASAN logs, and binwalk outputs.
